subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards God! We hope that, through divine grace and bounty, in the shelter of the Tree of Providence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله از فضل و موهبت موید حقیقی امیدواریم که در ظل سدره عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
